# Newsletter Skill

Newsletter Skill is a skill package for editorial calendars, issue structures, sponsorship slots, and subscriber growth.

Install:

```bash
npx skills add newsletterskill
```

## Primary agent resources

- Markdown index: https://newsletterskill.com/index.md
- Skill page: https://newsletterskill.com/skill/index.md
- Raw SKILL.md: https://newsletterskill.com/skills/newsletterskill/SKILL.md
- Skill discovery JSON: https://newsletterskill.com/.well-known/skills/index.json

## Articles

- How to Build an Agent-Ready Newsletter Strategy: https://newsletterskill.com/articles/agent-ready-email-strategy/index.md
- The Practical Newsletter Operations Playbook for AI Agents: https://newsletterskill.com/articles/email-operations-playbook/index.md
- Newsletter Skill Audit Checklist: From Prompt to Production: https://newsletterskill.com/articles/email-skill-audit-checklist/index.md
